name: Mark Target
description: Paint enemy with laser designator. Next attack against this target deals +3 damage.

name: Coordinated Strike
description: Synchronized attack with allied units. Deals bonus damage for each adjacent friendly.

name: Emergency Evacuation
description: Call emergency evac drones. Restore 8 HP but cannot move next turn.

name: Reconnaissance Sweep
description: Full-spectrum sensor sweep. Reveals HP, OL, and directives of all enemies.

name: Ammo Resupply
description: Resupply from drop pod. Reduces the overload cost of your next directive by 2.

name: Targeting Lock
description: Lock fire control onto target. Ignores evasion and cover bonuses for one attack.

name: Phalanx Formation
description: Link shields with adjacent friendlies. All linked units share damage taken evenly.

name: Fire Support Request
description: Call in mortar support from forward positions. 3x3 area bombardment.

name: Combat Stimulants
description: Inject combat stims. Gain +2 damage and +2 evasion for one turn, then lose 2 OL.

name: Signal Jammer
description: Deploy electronic countermeasures. Target enemy cannot use its next directive.
